CEMETERY MANAGEMENT SOFTWARE | CELEBRATION OF LIFE SOFTWARE

Cemetery Software to Easily Manage Plots, Maps, Sales, and Everlasting Memorials

Are you a cemetery manager looking to improve cemetery operations with online maps and digital records? If so, sign-up for our free trial or request a demo.
REQUEST A DEMO
OR, START FREE TRIAL
WHAT IS EVERARK?

EVERARK IS YOUR ALL-IN-ONE graveyard and CEMETERY MANAGEMENT SOFTWARE.
It is your first ever comprehensive cemetery software that offers both plot and burial management along with an ecommerce site to sell plots online. It is accompanied by a celebration of life social platform for loved ones of the deceased to share memories and stories. EverArk serves as your mobile memorial gardens that you can access anytime to cherish your loved one's memories.
WHAT DOES OUR CEMETERY MANAGEMENT SOFTWARE
​DO FOR CEMETERY TEAMS IN THE DEATH CARE INDUSTRY?

TRACK, SELL, & MANAGE cemetery PLOTS and services THE EASY WAY.

What is the key to painless cemetery plot tracking? If you’re running a cemetery or cremation business in the death care industry, the EverArk cemetery software is heaven sent. Use this great cemetery software with inventory management, sales tracking, customer organization, invoicing, maintenance control, and recordkeeping. ​
TRACK
Simple to navigate dashboard where you can easily track plot bookings, availability, revenue, and customers.
SELL
Generate invoices of your plots, sales contracts, deed recordings, and sales reports in just one-click.
MANAGE
Coordinate with team members and supervise work orders and tasks to better organize your business.

Convert your old paper cemetery maps to an online, interactive cemetery map experience - never lose track again.

BEFORE
Actual paper map before using EverArk
AFTER
Digital cemetery map after implementing EverArk
Used by cemeteries of all sizes, our graveyard management software has all the features you'd expect, and more!

Request a Demo
WHAT DOES OUR CELEBRATION OF LIFE SOFTWARE OFFER FOR PLOT OWNERS?

PLAN & ORGANIZE EVERYTHING FOR YOUR INTERMENT.

Tell your life story, add to your family tree, and administer your memorial, trust, and funeral notice, all within our browser software. Not only that, but our digital memorial software also includes setting up a charity, uploading your will, shutting down social media accounts, and designating a manager to make sure your last wishes are followed.
PREPARE
Manage your afterlife legacy, set up how your funeral will be, and create lasting memories to share.  ​
ORGANIZE
Add your family tree, set up a charity, file your trust, and assign a designee to help manage your digital legacy.
INVITE
Share your memorial, photos, comments, tributes, and notify family and friends of funeral details.
Your celebration of life starts with our digital legacy features.
Online Memorial
Tributes & Memories
Will & Trust
Family Tree
Last Wishes
Funeral Notice
Charity & Donations
Resting Place
Obituary & Eulogy
Photos & Videos
REQUEST A DEMO
WHAT DOES OUR CELEBRATION OF LIFE APP DO FOR FAMILIES AND FRIENDS?

create lasting tributes to share.

Browse, share, and cherish photos and memories of your loved ones using our digital legacy mobile app. Commemorate their lives in one celebration of life software.
Search for Loved Ones
BROWSE
App obituaries let you look for and find memorials of your loved ones by legacy or resting place. EverArk allows users to geo-tag and save burial locations with directions for other family members to search and view.​
SHARE
Our legacy app has a mobile social platform where you can create a community of people closest to you. You may build your community by sharing your loved one’s life story, photos, videos, and more.​
ALERTS
Get a chance to visit departed loved ones. You receive alerts and notifications when you are nearing a saved burial location of family members or friends.​  You can also set reminder alerts of a loved one's passing.
Our cemetery and graveyard solutions software just got better!
Soon you can manage everything at your fingertips. Anytime, anywhere!
Test out our beta release while it's free.
Test out our beta release while it's free.​
WHY SHOULD YOU USE EVERARK FOR YOUR CEMETERY?

free cemetery software.  NO other CEMETERY SOFTWARE provides MORE VALUE.

Intuitive and easy-to-use. Free trial. Affordable monthly user fees. No credit card. No long-term commitment. And learn at your own pace. Making cemetery decisions with our software has never been this easy.
TRY BEFORE YOU BUY
Sign up for our risk-free, 30-day free trial. No credit card required. Explore our software before deciding to subscribe.
LEARN AT  YOUR OWN PACE
Watch our get started online video tutorials and learn how to set up and use Everark cemetery software.
INTUITIVE NAVIGATION
Our navigation was designed to be easy-to-use so business owners and individuals could learn and adopt.
Request a demo
WHAT CEMETERY SOFTWARE SERVICES DO WE PROVIDE?

we are here to help you. 

We know implementing a new system can be daunting. Not to worry, our team is here to help you get started and oversee your success. With the cemetery solutions we provide, many cemeteries, funeral services, and web cemeteries have improved the way they organize and manage their businesses.
GET HANDS ON TRAINING
Need expert help to better understand the software? We will schedule remote online training sessions to help you learn the basics.
MAP YOUR CEMETERY
Work with our partners to capture the GPS coordinates of your cemetery and plots. This makes it easier to draft your cemetery business plan.
SELL YOUR PLOTS ONLINE
We will work with your IT team to add your new online storefront to your website so you can start selling online, and grow your cemetery revenue.
